are_you_ok.title: Dangerous heat grips South Texas before slight cooldown | Weather Impact Alert
are_you_ok.summary: Broad population affected by dangerous heat, check-in worthy
are_you_ok.description: Triple-digit heat returns Wednesday, with heat index values up to 114 degrees as Texas power demand reaches record levels.

conversation_starters.title: San Antonio has lost 2K manufacturing jobs since 2024. Industry experts say they aren’t too concerned.
conversation_starters.summary: 2K manufacturing jobs lost since 2024 — metro-level employment story. You could open with: 'Did you see San Antonio's shed a couple thousand manufacturing jobs — experts say not to worry?'
conversation_starters.description:
Greater:SATX, an organization tasked with bringing jobs to the San Antonio region, attributes the decline to the labor market settling.
San Antonio has lost 2K manufacturing jobs since 2024. Industry experts say they aren’t too concerned. was first posted on July 23, 2026 at 5:00 am.

conversation_starters.title: Free Sounds of Downtown concert series kicks off at Travis Park
conversation_starters.summary: Free downtown summer concert series — a work-safe, fun local opener. You could open with: 'Have you caught any of the free Sounds of Downtown shows at Travis Park?'
conversation_starters.description: Live music, food trucks and free parking return to downtown San Antonio with a weekly summer concert series.

you_should_know.title: Data centers emerge as flashpoint in Texas governor's race
you_should_know.summary: Data centers becoming a flashpoint in the governor's race — political context landing on TX water/power/land. Political, so not a conversation starter; kept as context.
you_should_know.description: Concerns over water, power and rural land are turning AI data centers into a major issue in Texas politics.
